calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ryan Szczepanik for (petitioner) Ingrid Meibergen-Tashiro.

The Court stated that it needs the attorney's time sheets to award extraordinary fees for services. Mr. Szczepanik stated that it is covered by attorney client privilege. The Court stated that it needs to be able to determine that the extraordinary fees are warranted and are not something covered under the statutory fees. Mr. Szczepanik reported that both his firm and their client have concerns that the filings are public record. The Court stated that attorney's fees are filed every single day in this court and that they are attorney client privilege is not the rule, not the practice and not the law. Mr. Szczepanik stated that the issue is currently before the Supreme Court. The Court stated that it was not in their papers and that their papers cited older cases. Mr. Szczepanik asked if the time sheets could be submitted under seal. The Court stated only if they qualify under 2.550 and 2.551. The court agreed to continue the matter to give Mr. Szczepanik time to consult with his client. The accounting petition was continued to September 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Continued To Sep-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Gerson for Ingrig Meibergen via court call.

Mr. Gerson confirmed that he filed a declaration regarding what has been done, is dealing with the estate taxes and will submit additional information by the end of this week. The accounting petition will be taken under submission as of March 2, 2015.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)
